question: What happens after I book the NIL Audit?
answer: You'll get a calendar invite within 24 hours. We hop on a 45-minute call, I go through your current brand and content, and you leave with a written report and a clear next step — no fluff, no upsell pressure.

question: Can I upgrade my plan after starting?
answer: Yes, always. Most athletes start with the NIL Audit and move to Brand Builder once they see what's possible. We make the transition seamless — your audit report carries over into the full strategy.

question: Do you work with athletes at any level — not just D1?
answer: Absolutely. I work with D1, D2, D3, NAIA, and junior college athletes. Your level doesn't determine your brand potential — your consistency does.

question: What sports do you work with?
answer: All of them. Football, basketball, baseball, soccer, track, volleyball, swimming — if you're competing at the college level, I can help you build a brand worth sponsoring.

question: How quickly will I start seeing results?
answer: Most athletes see brand engagement increase within the first 30 days. Actual deals vary — I've had athletes land their first deal in week three. I've had others take 60–90 days. It depends on your starting point and how consistent you are.

question: Is there a contract or commitment?
answer: No contracts. The NIL Audit is one-time. Brand Builder is month-to-month — cancel anytime. I want you here because it's working, not because you're locked in.
